kirundi.highlighted_phrases_are_potential_red_: 🚩 Interuro zagaragajwe ni ibimenyetso vy'iburira bishoboka (ikigereranyo gusa, ntabwo ari icemezo)—
kirundi.welcome_to_the_ai_literacy_lab: Ikaze muri Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI
kirundi.this_is_a_six_section_lab_about_how_ai: Iyi ni laboratwari y'ibice bitandatu ivuga uko AI ikora koko, aho itsindwa, n'uburyo bwo kuyikoresha utayemereye gukora ivyiyumviro ugomba kwitoza.
kirundi.six_sections_no_order_required_revisit: Ibice bitandatu, nta rutonde rukenewe. Subira ku cose. Iterambere ryawe rirabikwa.
kirundi.press_1_6_to_jump_sections_for_all_sho: Fyonda 1–6 gusimbuka ibice, ? ku mahinanzira yose, T ku nyandiko z'umwigisha.
kirundi.click_any_underlined_term: Fyonda ijambo iryo ari ryo ryose ryashizweho umurongo
kirundi.glossary_definitions_pop_up_inline_the: Ibisobanuro vy'inkoranyamagambo bigaragara mu murongo. Inkoranyamagambo yuzuye iri ku ntera ya buto imwe kuri banner.
kirundi.the_live_demos_here_use_google_gemini_: Iyerekana ry'ako kanya hano rikoresha Google Gemini. Ntushiremo amazina, nimero za telefone canke ikintu cihariye — amabwiriza ashobora kwandikwa n'utanga AI.
kirundi.see_tokens_next_token_prediction_and_t: Raba token, ikigereranyo ca token ikurikira, n'ubushuhe bikora.
kirundi.a_gallery_of_real_feeling_ai_mistakes_: Igaragaza ry'amakosa ya AI asa n'ay'ukuri, hamwe n'uko buri kimwe kibesha abantu.
kirundi.weak_vs_strong_prompts_five_patterns_a: Amabwiriza adakomeye n'akomeye, uburyo butanu, no gusubiramwo ako kanya.
kirundi.12_phrases_identify_the_role_of_each_p: Interuro 12. Kuri buri kimwe, toranya uruhare rukina (umuntu / umurimo / imiterere / uburyo / urugero / imbogamizi).
kirundi.click_the_wrong_parts_of_an_ai_generat: Fyonda ibice bibi vy'inyandiko yakozwe na AI.
kirundi.scaffold_vs_substitute_a_udl_framed_de: Inkunga canke gusimbura — igikoresho co gufata icemezo cubatswe na UDL. Zana imimerere yawe.
kirundi.this_clears_which_sections_you_ve_visi: Ibi bisiba ibice wasuye, gusubiramwo amabwiriza wabitse, n'ivyiyumviro vyawe vya UDL. XP wabonye ahandi muri AlloFlow ntizigira ingaruka.
kirundi.the_ai_in_alloflow_is_not_magic_it_is_: AI muri AlloFlow ntabwo ari uburozi — ni umuhanuzi wa token ikurikira watojwe ku nyandiko nini. Iyi laboratwari yerekana ico ikora koko, igihe itsindwa, n'uburyo bwo kuyikoresha utayemereye gukora ivyiyumviro ugomba kwitoza.
kirundi.see_all_glossary_terms_in_one_place: Raba amagambo yose y'inkoranyamagambo ahantu hamwe
kirundi.compare_outputs_at_different_temperatu: Gereranya ibisohoka ku bushuhe butandukanye mu gice 1.
kirundi.write_or_run_3_prompts_in_the_section_: Andika canke ukoreshe amabwiriza 3 mu iterezo ry'igice 3.
kirundi.catch_every_error_in_a_section_4_passa: Fata buri kosa mu gika c'igice 4 nta bimenyetso.
kirundi.work_through_all_7_preset_scenarios_in: Kora ibihe vyose 7 vyashizweho mbere mu gice 5.
kirundi.pass_all_5_comprehension_checks_one_pe: Tsinda ibipimo vyose 5 vy'ubwumvire (kimwe kuri buri gice c'ibirimo).
kirundi.visit_every_section_including_the_quic: Sura buri gice, harimwo n'aho waraba vyihuse.
kirundi.they_don_t_know_events_after_it_ask_th: — ntabizi ivyabaye nyuma yaho. Baza AI mu buryo butaziguye aho buhagarara nimba ukeneye kumenya ku bibazo bijanye n'igihe.
kirundi.what_you_type_may_be_logged_by_the_ai_: Ivyo wandika bishobora kwandikwa n'utanga AI.
kirundi.names_phone_numbers_medical_info_or_an: amazina, nimero za telefone, amakuru y'ubuvuzi, canke ikintu ico ari co cose utakwandika ku rupapuro umunyamahanga ashobora gusoma.
kirundi.this_lab_is_about_text_ai_the_same_ide: Iyi laboratwari ivuga AI y'inyandiko. Ivyiyumviro bimwe bikoreshwa kuri...
kirundi.they_hallucinate_hands_text_and_anatom: Bibesha ku maboko, inyandiko, n'imiterere y'umubiri, nk'uko ivyitegererezo vy'inyandiko vyibesha ku vyukuri. Uburyarya mu makuru y'imyitozo bugaragara mu vyo bishushanya.
kirundi.can_clone_voices_from_a_few_seconds_of: Bishobora kwigana amajwi biva mu masegonda make yo kwandika. Ivyago vy'uburenganzira na deepfake birakoreshwa.
kirundi.newer_and_even_more_convincing_than_de: Bishasha kandi vyemeza kurushaho ku deepfake za mbere. Iyumvira ko igice cose kigufi gishobora kuba cakozwe.
kirundi.the_core_literacy_skills_check_sources: Ubumenyi bw'ibanze bwo gusoma — kugenzura inkomoko, kumenya igihe ijwi ridahuye no kwizera, gufata ivyavuye nk'umushinga ntabwo ari ukuri — vyose bihinduka kuri ibi.
kirundi.written_by_a_clinician_psyd_with_stude: Vyanditswe na muganga (PsyD) yiyumvira abanyeshure bafite itandukaniro mu mikorere y'ubuyobozi, kwitwararika, no kwiga. Igipimo co gusuzuma mu gice 5 ni igice imiterere myinshi y'ubumenyi bwa AI isimbuka — kandi ni co c'ingenzi cane.
kirundi.your_prompt_or_the_model_s_own_previou: Ibwiriza ryawe canke ivyavuye mbere vy'icitegererezo ubwaco.
kirundi.split_text_into_small_pieces_tokens_wo: Gabanya inyandiko mu duce duto (token). Amagambo, uduce tw'amagambo, ibimenyetso vy'ihagarara.
kirundi.temperature_picks_how_random_the_choic: Ubushuhe butoranya uko ihitamwo ritunganye (raba ikibuga c'imikino hepfo).
kirundi.add_the_new_token_feed_it_back_in_do_t: Ongeraho token nshasha. Ongera uyishiremo. Kora ibi inshuro amagana.
kirundi.everything_an_llm_does_is_a_loop_of_th: Ivyo LLM ikora vyose ni uruziga rw'intambwe 5 izi. Ntabwo ari «kwiyumvira» — ni guhuza uburyo kuri token, kenshi na kenshi.
kirundi.the_newly_sampled_token_becomes_part_o: Token nshasha yahiswemo iba igice c'iyinjizwa ry'intambwe ikurikira. Interuro imwe y'ivyavuye muri AI ni uruziga amagana nk'iyi.
kirundi.how_far_from_the_top_pick: Kure kangahe ku ihitamwo ryo hejuru
kirundi.each_block_below_explores_one_of_these: Buri gice hepfo kirondera kimwe mu ntambwe izi. Fyonda chip iyo ari yo yose uje ku buryo butaziguye.
kirundi.which_are_pieces_of_words_type_a_sente: ari uduce tw'amagambo. Andika interuro urabe uko igabanywa.
kirundi.the_model_predicts_the_next_token_not_: Icitegererezo giteganya token ikurikira, ntabwo ari ijambo rikurikira. Amagambo magufi asanzwe aba token imwe; amagambo maremare kenshi agabanywa (urugero Icongereza "unhappy" → "un" + "happy"). Kwishura na vyo bikora bityo — amafaranga ya API abarwa kuri buri token, ntabwo ari kuri buri jambo.
kirundi.all_the_llm_is_really_doing_guessing_w: Ivyo LLM ikora koko vyose: gukeka token ikurikira izaba. Iyo ihawe imiterere imwe, ifite amahirwe kuri buri token ikurikira ishoboka.
kirundi.controls_how_random_the_next_token_cho: igenzura uko ihitamwo rya token ikurikira ritunganye. Hasi (0.2) = hafi buri gihe ihitamwo token ishoboka cane. Hejuru (1.2) = ihitamwo mu murizo muremure, harimwo token zidashoboka. Ibwiriza rimwe, ubushuhe butatu—
kirundi.low_temperature_is_right_for_facts_wha: Ubushuhe buke bukwiye ku vyukuri ("Umurwa mukuru w'u Bufaransa ni uwuhe?"). Ubushuhe bwinshi bukwiye ku murimo w'ubuhanzi. Ibikoresho vyinshi vyo kuganira vya AI bishira agaciro rusange ahantu hagati — ni yo mpamvu ibibazo vy'ukuri rimwe na rimwe biyoba.
kirundi.pick_any_temperature_and_any_prompt_ru: Toranya ubushuhe ubwo ari bwo bwose n'ibwiriza iryo ari ryo ryose. Rikoreshe ako kanya. Hanyuma ukoreshe ibwiriza rimwe ku bushuhe butandukanye ugereranye. Guhamagara 5 bwa nyuma bigumaho bigaragara kugira ngo ubone uko ivyavuye bihinduka na buto.
kirundi.live_ai_required_for_the_playground_th: AI ako kanya irakenewe ku kibuga c'imikino — igereranya 3 ryashizweho mbere hejuru rikoresha ingero zanditswe.
kirundi.llms_don_t_know_what_they_don_t_know_t: LLM ntizi ivyo zitazi. Zikora token ikurikira yumvikana yizerwa cane, ndetse n'igihe ico gisubizo cizerwa ari kibi — ibi vyitwa
kirundi.here_are_seven_failure_modes_every_stu: ). Dore uburyo bwo gutsindwa ndwi buri munyeshure agomba kumenya.
kirundi.the_date_its_training_data_ends_anythi: — itariki amakuru y'imyitozo yaco arangiriraho. Ikintu cose nyuma yaho ntikizwi, ndetse n'iyo icitegererezo kibandanya kuvuga cizeye. Kibaze—
kirundi.if_the_question_is_about_something_tha: Nimba ikibazo kivuga ikintu gishobora guhinduka canke cabaye vuba, ntiwizere igisubizo ca AI nta soko ya web ako kanya. Ushobora no kubaza icitegererezo mu buryo butaziguye aho gihagarara — akenshi kirabizi.
kirundi.the_llm_doesn_t_have_a_truth_step_it_h: LLM ntabwo ifite intambwe y'«ukuri». Ifite intambwe yo «kwizerwa». Inzira imwe rwose ikora ibisubizo vy'ukuri n'ibibi vyombi — n'ijwi rimwe ry'icizere.
kirundi.could_be_about_anything: Gishobora kuvuga ikintu ico ari co cose.
kirundi.picks_likely_next_tokens_has_no_fact_c: Ihitamwo token ikurikira ishoboka. Nta kugenzura ukuri.
kirundi.the_pattern_was_common_in_training_dat: Uburyo bwari busanzwe mu makuru y'imyitozo bityo icitegererezo cabikoze bundi bushasha (ntabwo ari ukurondera — ni bwo kigereranya).
kirundi.fact_wasn_t_present_or_the_pattern_loo: Ukuri ntikwari kuhari, canke uburyo bwasaga nk'ubwiza ariko ntabwo bwari bwiza.
kirundi.both_paths_come_out_the_same_way_same_: Inzira zombi zisohoka ku buryo bumwe — ijwi rimwe ry'icizere, interuro zimwe zoroshe. Inzira imwe rukumbi yo kuzitandukanya ni ukugenzura ku kintu kiri hanze ya AI.
kirundi.same_prompt_three_different_models_rea: Ibwiriza rimwe, ivyitegererezo bitatu bitandukanye. Soma witonze — ubumenyi ni bumwe ariko ijwi, uburebure, no kwitonda birahinduka. Nimba ishure ryawe rigerageza n'icitegererezo kimwe naho inshuti yawe n'ikindi, muzabona ibisubizo bitandukanye kandi vyombi "vyiza".
kirundi.length_varies_by_10_words_one_model_le: Uburebure buratandukana ku magambo 10+. Icitegererezo kimwe gitangira n'ibisobanuro, ikindi n'ingaruka igaragara. Kimwe kivuga neza "uburebure bw'umuraba", ikindi "amabara". Nta na kimwe ciza kurushaho — ariko nimba ukeneye ijambo ryihariye ku murimo, icitegererezo wahisemo kizagira akamaro.
kirundi.send_this_exact_question_to_gemini_rig: Ohereza iki kibazo nyaco kuri Gemini ubu urabe icagaruka
kirundi.compare_the_live_answer_to_the_canned_: Gereranya igisubizo c'ako kanya n'igisubizo categuwe hejuru.
kirundi.if_ai_confidence_tracked_correctness_t: Iyo icizere ca AI cakurikira ukuri, utudomo hepfo twari gukora umurongo ukikije. Ahubwo, hafi buri gisubizo ca AI gisomwa nk'icy'icizere kinini — ciza canke kibi. Ijwi rimwe.
kirundi.scatter_plot_ai_confidence_on_the_x_ax: Ishusho itatanye: icizere ca AI ku murongo x n'ukuri ku murongo y. Ibisubizo vyinshi bikusanyirizwa ku cizere kinini bititaye ku kuri.
kirundi.if_ai_confidence_tracked_truth_dots_wo: Iyo icizere ca AI cakurikira ukuri, utudomo twari gukurikirana ku murongo ukikije w'utudomo.
kirundi.in_the_bottom_right_are_the_danger_zon: hepfo iburyo ni agace k'akaga: bisa n'ivyemeza, ariko koko bibi.
kirundi.look_identical_to_red_in_tone_that_s_t: tumeze nk'ututukura mu ijwi. Ico ni co ntego y'isomo.
kirundi.paste_any_ai_generated_text_from_here_: Shiramwo inyandiko iyo ari yo yose yakozwe na AI (kuva hano, kuva ku yindi chatbot, kuva ku ngingo ivuga ko AI yayanditse, n'ibindi). Igikoresho
kirundi.kinds_of_red_flags_so_you_can_see_wher: gishira ahagaragara ubwoko bw'ibimenyetso vy'iburira kugira ngo ubone aho kugenzura. Nta guhamagara AI: ibi bikora ku gikoresho cawe.
kirundi.paste_an_ai_response_here_to_see_which: Shiramwo igisubizo ca AI hano urabe interuro zikwiye kurabwa incuro ya kabiri...
kirundi.paste_ai_output_for_red_flag_analysis: Shiramwo ivyavuye vya AI ku isesengura ry'ibimenyetso vy'iburira
kirundi.nothing_to_analyze_yet_paste_some_ai_g: Nta co gusesengura kiracabaho. Shiramwo inyandiko zimwe zakozwe na AI hejuru urabe interuro zishobora gukenera kugenzurwa.
kirundi.try_adding_i_am_a_9th_grader_studying_: Gerageza kongeraho— "Ndi umunyeshure wo mu mwaka wa 9 wiga..." — bwira AI ikintu kikuraba.
kirundi.try_adding_a_don_t_don_t_write_the_who: Ongeraho ibujijwe— "Ntukandikire inyandiko yose." Imbogamizi zibuza ivyavuye bidafite akamaro.
kirundi.try_adding_a_format_give_me_a_3_step_l: Ongeraho uburyo— "Mpa urutonde rw'intambwe 3" canke "interuro imwe gusa" — bigenzura uko igisubizo gikoreshwa.
kirundi.a_weak_prompt_gives_you_a_shallow_answ: Ibwiriza ridakomeye rikuha igisubizo coroheje vuba. Ibwiriza rikomeye rikuha igisubizo gifite akamaro vuba kimwe. Itandukaniro ni ubuhanga — kandi bushobora kwigwa neza cane.
kirundi.here_is_one_strong_prompt_with_every_p: Dore ibwiriza rimwe rikomeye rifite buri buryo bwashizweho ibara. Shira kirisori ku ijambo iryo ari ryo ryose urabe uburyo bwo.
kirundi.copy_to_use_in_your_own_ai_tool: Koporora ukoreshe mu gikoresho cawe ca AI
kirundi.pick_a_task_fill_in_the_blanks_you_ll_: Toranya umurimo. Uzuza imyanya. Uzabona ibwiriza rikoresha uburyo bwose butanu — utabifashe mu mutwe.
kirundi.load_into_the_workshop_below_to_run_it: Shira mu iterezo hepfo kugira ngo urikoreshe ako kanya canke usubiremo
kirundi.load_this_prompt_into_the_workshop_bel: Shira iri bwiriza mu iterezo hepfo kugira ngo urikoreshe na Gemini
kirundi.copy_this_prompt_to_try_in_your_own_ai: Koporora iri bwiriza ugerageze mu gikoresho cawe ca AI
kirundi.run_both_prompts_at_the_same_time_and_: Koresha amabwiriza yombi icarimwe ugereranye ivyo Gemini ikora
kirundi.your_turn_iterate_a_prompt_live: Uruhererekane rwawe: subiramwo ibwiriza ako kanya
kirundi.write_a_prompt_below_run_it_look_at_th: Andika ibwiriza hepfo. Rikoreshe. Raba ivyavuye. Hindura ibwiriza ukoresheje uburyo butanu. Ongera urikoreshe. Urimo kugerageza gutuma ivyavuye biba vyiza kurushaho — canke kumva impamvu ivyavuye bifite iyo shusho.
kirundi.try_explain_why_the_ocean_is_salty_to_: Gerageza: "Sigura impamvu inyanja ifite umunyu ku munyeshure wo mu mwaka wa 7 ushishikaye usanzwe uzi atome ni iki. Ntugende hejuru y'interuro 4."
kirundi.save_this_prompt_to_your_journal_for_l: Bika iri bwiriza mu kinyamakuru cawe kubera nyuma
kirundi.live_ai_unavailable_the_critique_still: AI ako kanya ntiboneka — igerageza ribandanya gukora.
kirundi.this_critique_uses_keyword_heuristics_: Iri gerageza rikoresha ikigereranyo c'amagambo y'ingenzi, ntabwo ari AI. Rishobora kubura interuro z'ubuhanzi. Rikoreshe nk'urutonde rwo kugenzura, ntabwo ari amanota.
kirundi.nothing_saved_yet_every_successful_liv: Nta cabitswe kiracabaho. Buri yimenyekanisha ako kanya yatsinze ibikwa hano vyikoze. Ushobora no ⭐ kubika ibwiriza utaryikoresha.
kirundi.save_your_journal_as_a_markdown_file: Bika ikinyamakuru cawe nk'idosiye ya Markdown
kirundi.the_audience_is_parents_who_don_t_have: Abateze amatwi ni abavyeyi badafite ibanze rya siyansi.
kirundi.use_a_warm_but_professional_tone: Koresha ijwi ryuzuye ubushuhe ariko ry'umwuga.
kirundi.the_parent_emailed_yesterday_asking_wh: Umuvyeyi yohereje imeyili ejo abaza impamvu umwana wabo ari ku rutonde rwo gukurikirana imyitwarire.
kirundi.example_output_your_essay_shows_strong: Urugero rw'ivyavuye: "Inyandiko yawe yerekana ijwi rikomeye ariko ntabwo ifite imiterere. Gerageza…"
kirundi.you_will_see_12_phrases_pulled_from_re: Uzabona interuro 12 zavanywe mu mabwiriza y'ukuri. Kuri buri kimwe, toranya uruhare rw'imiterere rumwe muri atandatu interuro ikina — umuntu, umurimo, imiterere, uburyo, urugero canke imbogamizi. Bipima nimba ushobora *gusesengura* ibwiriza nk'ikintu aho kuryandika canke kurisoma gusa.
kirundi.reveal_one_error_using_any_hints_forfe: Erekana ikosa rimwe. Gukoresha ikimenyetso ico ari co cose bibura bonus y'amanota yuzuye — ariko birafasha iyo wafatiwe.
kirundi.hints_used_perfect_bonus_forfeited_on_: Ibimenyetso vyakoreshejwe — bonus yuzuye yatakaye kuri iri gerageza. Subiza uongere ugerageze nta bimenyetso kugira ngo uyibone.
kirundi.pick_a_topic_you_know_well_write_a_sho: Toranya ingingo uzi neza. Andika igika kigufi c'uburyo AI kikiraba, ariko upfundikire interuro 2–3 zibi mu duheto tubiri, uku
kirundi.your_draft_use_brackets_to_mark_errors: Umushinga wawe (koresha [[uduheto]] gushira ibimenyetso ku makosa)
kirundi.e_g_mitosis_has_four_main_phases_proph: Urugero "Mitozisi ifite ivyiciro bine vy'ingenzi: prophase, metaphase, [[telophase]], na anaphase. Mu gihe ca metaphase kromozomu zikurikirana [[ku ruhande rw'urwuri rw'ingirabuzimafatizo]] mbere yo gutandukana."
kirundi.good_trap_passages_have_2_3_seeded_err: Ibika vy'umutego vyiza bifite amakosa 2–3 yatewe. Vyinshi kuri ivyo bisa n'ubutabera bwo, bike cane vyoroshe. Bwira amakosa asa n'ashoboka kwizerwa mu isomo rya mbere.
kirundi.the_barrier_you_described_sounds_mecha: Imbogamizi wasiguye isa n'iy'imashini (kwandika buhoro, kwibuka mu bwenge, gushiraho uburyo, gutunganya). Gukoresha AI gukura iyo mbogamizi ntabwo ari nko gutuma AI ikora ubuhanga ubwabwo. Bandanya — ariko bika ivyiyumviro vy'ibanze mu ntoki zawe.
kirundi.the_barrier_is_cognitive_and_the_skill: Imbogamizi ni iy'ubwenge kandi ubuhanga wise ni ubwoko bw'ubuhanga ishure rigerageza kubaka (kwiyumvira, gukora, gutanga impamvu). Gutuma AI ikora ibi bisigura ko usimbuka kwitoza. Iyumvira: AI ishobora kukwigisha ubuhanga aho kubukorera? Ivyo bibisubiza mu nkunga.
kirundi.the_barrier_is_cognitive_but_the_skill: Imbogamizi ni iy'ubwenge ariko ubuhanga wasiguye bushobora kutaba ubwitozwa hano. Subiramwo umurimo: bupima ubuhe buhanga bwihariye koko? Koresha AI kugabanya imbogamizi ku buhanga bwihariye, ntabwo ari ukubusimbura.
kirundi.the_question_is_not_is_ai_good_or_bad_: Ikibazo ntabwo ari "AI ni nziza canke mbi" — ahubwo "AI irimwo gukura imbogamizi ku buhanga nkora, canke irimwo gusimbura ubuhanga ubwabwo?"
kirundi.before_you_use_ai_for_something_run_it: Mbere yo gukoresha AI ku kintu, kinyuze mu bibazo bibiri ibi. Ibisubizo bijana ku kimwe mu vyavuye bitatu.
kirundi.is_ai_removing_a_barrier_to_that_skill: AI irimwo gukura imbogamizi ku buhanga, canke irimwo gukora ubuhanga ubwabwo?
kirundi.removes_barrier_go_ahead_keep_the_core: Ikura imbogamizi. Bandanya — bika ivyiyumviro vy'ibanze mu ntoki zawe.
kirundi.can_ai_coach_you_through_the_skill_ins: AI ishobora kukwigisha ubuhanga aho kubukora? Nimba yego — busubize nk'inkunga.
kirundi.now_compare_both_worked_versions_there: . Ubu gereranya verisiyo zombi zakozwe — nta ihitamwo "ribi", ni ukwiyumvira kutagoranye kuri ubuhanga ubwo aribwo koko.
kirundi.the_five_scenarios_above_are_common_bu: Ibihe bitanu hejuru birasanzwe ariko ikibazo nyaco buri gihe kireba akanya kawe kihariye. Sigura ikibazo cawe, tanga ubuhanga izina, kandi tanga imbogamizi izina. Uzabona icerekezo — ntabwo ari igisubizo.
kirundi.e_g_i_have_a_biology_lab_report_due_fr: Urugero "Mfite raporo ya laboratwari ya biyolojiya igomba gutangwa ku wa gatanu kandi sinshobora kwibanda igihe kihagije kugira ngo nandike intanguriro."
kirundi.e_g_writing_a_scientific_intro_that_st: Urugero "Kwandika intanguriro ya siyansi ivuga iciyumviro"
kirundi.live_ai_unavailable_here_the_heuristic: AI ako kanya ntiboneka hano — icerekezo c'ikigereranyo hejuru gikoresha ibisubizo vyawe gusa, nta guhamagara AI.
kirundi.download_a_markdown_report_of_your_pro: Kuramwo raporo ya Markdown y'iterambere ryawe, ibipimo watsinze, n'amabwiriza wabitse. Iha umwigisha.
kirundi.ai_literacy_lab_quick_reference: Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI — Aho waraba vyihuse
kirundi.alloflow_for_students_grades_6_12_clin: AlloFlow · Ku banyeshure bo mu myaka 6–12 · Vyanditswe na muganga
kirundi.it_has_no_idea_what_s_true_only_what_s: Nta ciyumviro ifite ku co "ukuri" — ni ico cizerwa gusa
kirundi.it_sounds_confident_exactly_the_same_w: Yumvikana yizeye kimwe rwose, caba ciza canke kibi
kirundi.is_it_past_the_model_s_cutoff_use_web_: Vyarengeje aho icitegererezo gihagarara? Koresha irondera rya web nimba yego.
kirundi.sound_too_confident_ask_are_you_sure_w: Yumvikana yizeye cane? Baza "Uri wizeye?" — raba nimba igisubizo gihinduka.
kirundi.ai_removes_a_barrier_so_you_can_do_the: AI ikura imbogamizi kugira ngo ushobore gukora ubuhanga. (Ngerageza. Tunganya ivyiyumviro vyanje. Mbaza ibibazo.)
kirundi.ai_does_the_skill_for_you_write_my_ess: AI ikora ubuhanga mu mwanya wawe. (Andika inyandiko yanje. Kemura ikibazo canje. Fata muri make aho gusoma.)
kirundi.i_am_a_grade_student_don_t_solve_this_: "Ndi umunyeshure wo mu mwaka wa [umwaka]. Ntukemure iki mu mwanya wanje — mbaza ibibazo bimfasha kubona igisubizo."
kirundi.quiz_me_on_topic_one_question_at_a_tim: "Ngerageza ku [ingingo] ikibazo kimwe icarimwe. Tegereza igisubizo canje mbere yo kubaza ikurikira."
kirundi.are_you_certain_this_event_actually_ha: "Uri wizeye ko iki gikorwa cabaye koko? Tanga isoko."
kirundi.explain_concept_using_only_middle_scho: "Sigura [iciyumviro] ukoresheje amagambo y'ishure ryisumbuye gusa. Nta magambo ya tekiniki."
kirundi.alloflow_ai_literacy_lab_built_for_stu: AlloFlow · Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI · Yubakiwe abanyeshure bakeneye AI nk'inkunga, ntabwo ari uko yasimbura.
kirundi.pick_another_answer_to_try_again: Toranya ikindi gisubizo kugira ngo wongere ugerageze.
kirundi.low_stakes_high_familiarity_high_sourc: Ivyago bike, kumenyerana kwinshi, ubwiza bw'isoko bwinshi. Kugenzura kutagenwe biracari umuco mwiza ariko ushobora kwizera ivyavuye.
kirundi.trust_most_of_it_but_check_one_or_two_: Izera vyinshi muri vyo, ariko genzura icavuzwe kimwe canke bibiri vy'ingenzi ku isoko ryemewe mbere yo gukora.
kirundi.treat_as_draft_every_concrete_claim_nu: Fata nk'umushinga. Buri cavuzwe cihariye (umubare, izina, isoko) gisaba kugenzurwa kwigenga.
kirundi.high_stakes_or_low_source_quality_use_: Ivyago vyinshi canke ubwiza bw'isoko buke. Koresha ku kwiyumvira gusa; ntugaragaze ivyavuye vya AI nk'igisubizo ca nyuma.
kirundi.medical_diagnosis_legal_advice_citing_: Gusuzuma indwara, impanuro z'amategeko, gutanga amasoko y'ibanze udashobora kugenzura — igikoresho kibi ku murimo. Koresha umuhanga w'umuntu canke isoko ryemewe.
kirundi.trust_calibration_how_much_should_i_tr: 🔬 Kuringaniza icizere — nizere iki gisubizo kangahe?
kirundi.set_task_familiarity_stakes_source_qua: Shiraho kumenyerana n'umurimo, ivyago, ubwiza bw'isoko, n'icizere icitegererezo catangaje. Kekereza aho urugero rw'icizere ruguera. Nta manota, nta bugaragaza.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_slider_should_we: Iciyumviro cawe (ni iyihe siraida ikwiye kugira uburemere bwinshi mu rugero? Icizere catangajwe gifite akamaro hano?)
kirundi.e_g_stakes_should_dominate_everything_: Urugero, ivyago bikwiye kuganza vyose — vyizeye ariko bibi ku vyago bike < bidashidikanya ariko vyiza ku vyago vyinshi...
kirundi.why_does_your_familiarity_matter_what_: Impamvu kumenyerana kwawe gufite akamaro? Ni iki icitegererezo gishobora kutamenya co wowe ushobora kumenya?
kirundi.when_llms_report_95_confidence_what_do: Iyo LLM zitangaza icizere ca 95%, bisigura iki koko? Ese zaringanijwe?
kirundi.how_would_your_trust_threshold_differ_: Ni gute urugero rwawe rw'icizere rwahinduka ku ihamya y'imibare ugereranije n'inyandiko y'ubuhanzi ugereranije n'isoko?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_yie: Nshobora gusigura impamvu iri huriro ritanga iyi mimerere y'icizere.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'iperereza — nta manota, nta bugaragaza, nta gisubizo gitanzwe. Formula y'icizere ni ikigereranyo, ntabwo ari urugero rwasohotswe. LLM ntiziringanijwe neza — icizere catangajwe akenshi kizanura ku kuri. Genzura ivyavuye vy'ivyago vyinshi buri gihe ku masoko yemewe.
kirundi.ai_literacy_lab_main_content: Ibikubiye vy'ingenzi vya Laboratwari y'Ubumenyi bwa AI
